---
title: "Canonical Zeckendorf Normalization and the Minimal Berstel Adder"
subtitle: "Formal language theory and automata"
date: 2026-04-07
categories: [gen2, formal, submitted]
target-journal: "RAIRO Theoretical Informatics and Applications"
status: "Submitted"
repo: "the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo"
theorems: 44
featured: false
video: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_video.mp4"
slides: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_slides.pdf"
podcast: "https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_podcast.wav"
description: "The canonical low-to-high Zeckendorf normalization is non-subsequential with exact prefix-destruction index Delta(n)=n. The Berstel transducer is proved minimal with exact state complexity 10 via kern..."
---

## Abstract

The canonical low-to-high Zeckendorf normalization is non-subsequential with exact prefix-destruction index Delta(n)=n. The Berstel transducer is proved minimal with exact state complexity 10 via kernel separation.

**Keywords:** Zeckendorf numeration, transducer theory, subsequential functions, Fibonacci addition, state complexity

## Key Metrics

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Machine-verified theorems | 44 |
| Target journal | RAIRO Theoretical Informatics and Applications |
| Status | Submitted |
| Scope | Formal language theory and automata |

## Infographic

![zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata Infographic](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_infographic.png)

## Video Explainer

{{< video https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_video.mp4 >}}

**Downloads:**

- [Slides (PDF)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_slides.pdf)
- [Podcast (WAV)](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/releases/download/media-v1/zeckendorf_streaming_normalization_automata_podcast.wav)

- [Full Paper (GitHub)](../../papers/zeckendorf-streaming-normalization-automata-rairo/)
- [Lean 4 Proofs](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath/tree/dev-automation-integration/lean4)
- [Automath Engine](https://github.com/the-omega-institute/automath)
